goal: Fix the community home view so the post list under the '全部' category can scroll reliably on desktop without changing content, layout intent, or community behavior.
constraints: Do not change community copy or data logic.
Keep the existing community structure and visual hierarchy intact.
Limit edits to community UI containers and directly related task records.
Prefer a minimal container/flex overflow fix over interaction rewrites.
deliverables: Restore reliable vertical scrolling for the community list in the default '全部' view.
Keep related list views stable after the scroll fix.
Validate the fix with a production build and finalize workflow.
